message:
feat: Expand comptime opcode handlers (55 ops)

- Add bitwise helpers (frozen_and/or/xor/shl/sar/shr/not)
- Convert bitwise ops to comptime handlers
- Add inc/dec comptime patterns
- Add return/return_undef comptime patterns
- Update README with accurate opcode counts

files.patch:
@@ -201,26 +201,28 @@ zig build cli -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
 
 **Architecture:** Function-level validation ensures correctness. If a function contains unsupported opcodes, it runs in the interpreter instead - no crashes, no wrong results.
 
-**Supported opcodes (79 of ~250):**
+**Supported opcodes (87 of ~250):**
 
 | Category | Count | Opcodes | Comptime |
 |----------|-------|---------|----------|
-| Arithmetic | 12 | **add, sub, mul, div, mod**, neg, plus, inc, dec, inc_loc, dec_loc, add_loc | 5 ✓ |
+| Arithmetic | 12 | **add, sub, mul, div, mod, inc, dec**, neg, plus, inc_loc, dec_loc, add_loc | 7 ✓ |
 | Comparison | 8 | **lt, lte, gt, gte, eq, neq, strict_eq, strict_neq** | 8 ✓ |
-| Bitwise | 7 | and, or, xor, shl, sar, shr, not | - |
+| Bitwise | 7 | **and, or, xor, shl, sar, shr, not** | 7 ✓ |
 | Push/const | 14 | **push_minus1, push_0..7**, push_i8/i16/i32, push_true/false, null, undefined | 9 ✓ |
 | Locals | 12 | **get_loc0..3**, get_loc, get_loc8, **put_loc0..3**, put_loc, put_loc8 | 8 ✓ |
 | Arguments | 7 | **get_arg0..3**, get_arg, **put_arg0, put_arg1** | 6 ✓ |
 | Var refs | 4 | get_var_ref0..3 | - |
-| Control | 10 | if_false/8, if_true/8, goto/8/16, return, return_undef | - |
+| Control | 10 | if_false/8, if_true/8, goto/8/16, **return, return_undef** | 2 ✓ |
 | Calls | 4 | call0, call1, call2, call3 | - |
 | Stack | 3 | **drop, dup, dup2** | 3 ✓ |
+| Property | 3 | **get_field, get_field2, put_field** | 3 ✓ |
+| TCO | 2 | **tail_call, tail_call_method** | 2 ✓ |
 
-> **Bold** = comptime-generated from `opcode_handlers.zig` patterns (39 ops)
+> **Bold** = comptime-generated from `opcode_handlers.zig` patterns (55 ops)
 > When QuickJS-NG updates, only regenerate opcodes - handlers auto-generate
 
-**Supported:** Any pure function using only the above opcodes (arithmetic, comparison, locals, args, control flow).
-**Not supported:** Object property access (`obj.foo`), closures, async/await, classes, `eval`.
+**Supported:** Any pure function using only the above opcodes (arithmetic, comparison, locals, args, control flow, property access).
+**Not supported:** Closures, async/await, classes, `eval`.
 
 ```bash
 # Build and use frozen interpreter

@@ -38,6 +38,14 @@ pub const HandlerPattern = enum {
     prop_get2,
     /// Property put: pop obj + value, set obj[atom] = value
     prop_put,
+    /// Unary bitwise: pop 1, apply bitwise op, push result
+    bitwise_unary,
+    /// Unary increment: pop, add 1, push
+    inc_op,
+    /// Unary decrement: pop, sub 1, push
+    dec_op,
+    /// Return: pop value and return it (or return undefined)
+    return_op,
     /// Complex: requires runtime-specific handling
     complex,
 };
@@ -125,6 +133,17 @@ pub fn getHandler(op: Opcode) Handler {
         .get_field2 => .{ .pattern = .prop_get2 },
         .put_field => .{ .pattern = .prop_put },
 
+        // ==================== BITWISE UNARY ====================
+        .not => .{ .pattern = .bitwise_unary, .c_func = "frozen_not" },
+
+        // ==================== UNARY INCREMENT/DECREMENT ====================
+        .inc => .{ .pattern = .inc_op },
+        .dec => .{ .pattern = .dec_op },
+
+        // ==================== RETURN ====================
+        .@"return" => .{ .pattern = .return_op, .index = 1 }, // return value
+        .return_undef => .{ .pattern = .return_op, .index = 0 }, // return undefined
+
         // Default: complex handler needed
         else => .{ .pattern = .complex },
     };
@@ -192,6 +211,26 @@ pub fn generateCode(comptime handler: Handler, comptime op_name: []const u8) []c
             .{op_name},
         ),
 
+        .bitwise_unary => std.fmt.comptimePrint(
+            "    /* {s} */\n    {{ JSValue a = POP(); PUSH({s}(ctx, a)); }}\n",
+            .{ op_name, handler.c_func.? },
+        ),
+
+        .inc_op => std.fmt.comptimePrint(
+            "    /* {s} */\n    {{ JSValue a = POP(); PUSH(frozen_add(ctx, a, JS_MKVAL(JS_TAG_INT, 1))); }}\n",
+            .{op_name},
+        ),
+
+        .dec_op => std.fmt.comptimePrint(
+            "    /* {s} */\n    {{ JSValue a = POP(); PUSH(frozen_sub(ctx, a, JS_MKVAL(JS_TAG_INT, 1))); }}\n",
+            .{op_name},
+        ),
+
+        .return_op => if (handler.index.? == 1)
+            std.fmt.comptimePrint("    /* {s} */\n    return POP();\n", .{op_name})
+        else
+            std.fmt.comptimePrint("    /* {s} */\n    return JS_UNDEFINED;\n", .{op_name}),
+
         .complex => "    /* complex handler - not auto-generated */\n",
         else => "    /* unhandled pattern */\n",
     };
